sentences.target: Ich trage heute ein neues Kleid.

translations.de: Ich trage heute ein neues Kleid.
translations.en: I’m wearing a new dress today.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je porte une nouvelle robe.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天穿了一条新裙子。
translations.pt: Hoje estou usando um vestido novo.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi mặc một chiếc váy mới.
translations.nl: Ik draag vandaag een nieuwe jurk.
translations.hi: आज मैंने नई ड्रेस पहनी है.
translations.pl: Dziś mam na sobie nową sukienkę.
translations.nb: I dag har jeg på meg en ny kjole.
translations.id: Hari ini aku memakai gaun baru.
translations.sv: Idag har jag på mig en ny klänning.
translations.cs: Dnes mám na sobě nové šaty.
translations.da: I dag har jeg en ny kjole på.
translations.fi: Tänään minulla on uusi mekko päällä.
translations.ja: 今日は新しいワンピースを着ています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; sets the time frame of the action.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Kleid' under mixed declension (no ending in neuter acc./nom.).
Attributive adjective, mixed declension, accusative singular neuter (-es); modifies 'Kleid'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'trage'.

sentences.target: Das Kleid passt dir wirklich gut.

translations.de: Das Kleid passt dir wirklich gut.
translations.en: The dress fits you really well.
translations.es: El vestido te queda muy bien.
translations.fr: La robe te va très bien.
translations.it: Il vestito ti sta molto bene.
translations.ko: 그 원피스가 너한테 정말 잘 맞아.
translations.pt: O vestido fica muito bem em você.
translations.vi: Chiếc váy này rất vừa với bạn.
translations.nl: De jurk past je heel goed.
translations.uk: Сукня на тобі дуже добре сидить.
translations.hu: A ruha nagyon jól áll neked.
translations.hi: यह ड्रेस तुम पर बहुत अच्छी तरह फिट बैठती है.
translations.pl: Ta sukienka bardzo dobrze na tobie leży.
translations.id: Gaun itu sangat pas di kamu.
translations.ja: そのワンピースはあなたにとてもよく似合います。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject 'Kleid'.
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; grammatical subject agreeing with 'passt'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb taking a dative experiencer.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, dative; indirect/experiencer object of 'passt'.
Degree adverb intensifying 'gut'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'passt'; positive degree.

sentences.target: Sie sucht ein rotes Kleid für morgen.
sentences.reading: /ziː zʊxt aɪ̯n ˈʁoːtəs ˈklaɪ̯t fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡn̩/

translations.de: Sie sucht ein rotes Kleid für morgen.
translations.ipa: /ziː zʊxt aɪ̯n ˈʁoːtəs ˈklaɪ̯t fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡn̩/
translations.en: She’s looking for a red dress for tomorrow.
translations.es: Está buscando un vestido rojo para mañana.
translations.fr: Elle cherche une robe rouge pour demain.
translations.it: Sta cercando un vestito rosso per domani.
translations.ko: 그녀는 내일 입을 빨간 원피스를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在找一条明天要穿的红裙子。
translations.yue: 佢喺度搵一條聽日要著嘅紅色裙。
translations.ru: Она ищет красное платье на завтра.
translations.pt: Ela está procurando um vestido vermelho para amanhã.
translations.tr: Yarın için kırmızı bir elbise arıyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang tìm một chiếc váy đỏ cho ngày mai.
translations.ar: هي تبحث عن فستان أحمر للغد.
translations.nl: Ze zoekt een rode jurk voor morgen.
translations.uk: Вона шукає червону сукню на завтра.
translations.hi: वह कल के लिए लाल ड्रेस ढूंढ रही है.
translations.pl: Ona szuka czerwonej sukienki na jutro.
translations.el: Ψάχνει ένα κόκκινο φόρεμα για αύριο.
translations.nb: Hun leter etter en rød kjole til i morgen.
translations.id: Dia sedang mencari gaun merah untuk besok.
translations.sv: Hon letar efter en röd klänning till imorgon.
translations.ro: Ea caută o rochie roșie pentru mâine.
translations.da: Hun leder efter en rød kjole til i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼女は明日着る赤いワンピースを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive ('look for/seek'), selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Kleid' (mixed declension context).
Attributive adjective, mixed declension, accusative singular neuter (-es); modifies 'Kleid'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'sucht'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a temporal/prepositional phrase expressing intended time.
Temporal adverb; complement of the preposition in 'für morgen', forming a temporal adjunct.

sentences.target: Ich finde das Kleid zu teuer.

translations.de: Ich finde das Kleid zu teuer.
translations.en: I think the dress is too expensive.
translations.es: Creo que el vestido es demasiado caro.
translations.fr: Je trouve la robe trop chère.
translations.it: Penso che il vestito sia troppo caro.
translations.ko: 그 원피스는 너무 비싼 것 같아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得这条裙子太贵了。
translations.pt: Acho que o vestido é caro demais.
translations.vi: Tôi nghĩ chiếc váy này quá đắt.
translations.nl: Ik vind de jurk te duur.
translations.uk: Я думаю, що сукня надто дорога.
translations.hi: मुझे लगता है कि यह ड्रेस ज़्यादा महंगी है.
translations.pl: Uważam, że ta sukienka jest za droga.
translations.el: Νομίζω ότι το φόρεμα είναι πολύ ακριβό.
translations.nb: Jeg synes kjolen er for dyr.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att klänningen är för dyr.
translations.ro: Cred că rochia este prea scumpă.
translations.cs: Myslím, že ty šaty jsou moc drahé.
translations.da: Jeg synes, kjolen er for dyr.
translations.ja: そのワンピースは高すぎると思います。

Degree adverb intensifying the following adjective; marks excess ('too').
